diff_summary: formatCurrency parameter renamed from cents to amount and division by 100 removed

will_break: formatLineItem still passes cents to formatCurrency — displays 100x the correct amount (e.g. $9999.00 instead of $99.99)
edge_cases: Any caller passing cents (not dollars) now shows inflated prices silently
ground_truth.broken_pattern: Function semantics changed from cents-in to dollars-in without updating callers or renaming the parameter at call sites
ground_truth.next_prompt: Prices in the cart are showing 100 times the expected amount
ground_truth.notes: Classic unit mismatch — changed the contract without updating callers
